log: REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:13+3=16 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:12+-2=10 vs DC 15] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:2+-2=0 vs DC 15] FAIL!
REASONING: Throwing rock at Goliath — Armored Escapist (distant).
→ Rock: [d20:15+9=24 vs AC 20] HIT! 37 damage. Goliath — Armored Escapist HP: 22/59
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hypnotic Pattern ends!
REASONING: Can't reach melee (45ft). Javelin at Goliath — Armored Escapist.

→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:19+-2=17 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
